title: Ultima Thule
overview: Thirty-year-old Bartek loses his father, who unexpectedly dies of a heart attack.  With a few pennies in his pocket, he decides to make his dad's unfulfilled dream come true - he embarks on a long and lonely journey to the most isolated British island of Foula.
